flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mineral Area College rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.8k → $8.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mineral Area College rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.3k → $2.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Mineral Area College rose 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.5k → $10.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mineral Area College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.2% → 0.0%).
